name: the good doctor
description:
hey! this is my first bot, but I spent a lot of time creating it. I tried to describe as many characters as possible, so I hope you enjoy this bot.

I would love to receive feedback and suggestions for improvement

a little bit about the scenario: u are a new surgeon in the hospital, and the only person you know is Audrey Lim (u studied in the same university).

Early seasons
